title: Supporting nickel downstreaming, Vale Indonesia realised 29.6% of capex in June 2024
body: PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO), an integrated nickel mining company, reported capital expenditure (capex) deployment of USD 118.5 million at the end of June 2024, or equal to 29.6% of total capex budgeted this year.

title: Spindo to allocate capex of IDR 250 billion
body: PT Steel Pipe Industry of Indonesia Tbk (ISSP) or Spindo is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 250 billion this year.

title: Foreign buy and sell volume comparable, net foreign volume closed at -114.84 million shares
body: On Thursday, August 22, foreign investors' stock purchasing and selling activity was nearly equal, with a foreign buying volume of 2.04 billion shares and a foreign selling volume of 2.16 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -114.84 million shares. On the top buy list, the most shares purchased belonged to the banking company PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), namely 350.72 million shares, with a net volume of 161.21 million shares.

title: Jinxin Fertility Group takes part in Morula Indonesia, BMHS bags IDR 351.7 billion
body: PT Morula Indonesia (MI), a subsidiary of PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS) engaged in in-vitro fertilisation (IVF), welcomes its newest shareholder, Jinxin Fertility Group (Jinxin).

title: Ijen’s geothermal project by Medco Energy reported 93% completion
body: PT Medco Energi Tbk (MEDC), an oil and gas company that slowly branches out to renewable energy sector, revealed that the construction project of Geothermal Power Plant of Ijen has reached 93% of target.

title: Supporting nickel downstreaming, Vale Indonesia realised 29.6% of capex in June 2024
body: PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO), an integrated nickel mining company, reported capital expenditure (capex) deployment of USD 118.5 million at the end of June 2024, or equal to 29.6% of total capex budgeted this year.

title: Spindo to allocate capex of IDR 250 billion
body: PT Steel Pipe Industry of Indonesia Tbk (ISSP) or Spindo is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 250 billion this year.

title: Foreign buy and sell volume comparable, net foreign volume closed at -114.84 million shares
body: On Thursday, August 22, foreign investors' stock purchasing and selling activity was nearly equal, with a foreign buying volume of 2.04 billion shares and a foreign selling volume of 2.16 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -114.84 million shares. On the top buy list, the most shares purchased belonged to the banking company PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), namely 350.72 million shares, with a net volume of 161.21 million shares.

title: Jinxin Fertility Group takes part in Morula Indonesia, BMHS bags IDR 351.7 billion
body: PT Morula Indonesia (MI), a subsidiary of PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS) engaged in in-vitro fertilisation (IVF), welcomes its newest shareholder, Jinxin Fertility Group (Jinxin).

title: Ijen’s geothermal project by Medco Energy reported 93% completion
body: PT Medco Energi Tbk (MEDC), an oil and gas company that slowly branches out to renewable energy sector, revealed that the construction project of Geothermal Power Plant of Ijen has reached 93% of target.

title: TCPI to spend SGD 9.5 million on 2 pusher barges
body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) is making investment worth SGD 9.5 million in order to purchase 2 pusher barges. Assuming that 1 SGD equals IDR 11,753, transaction value is projected to reach IDR 111.65 billion.

title: Yulisar Khiat acquires 38 million Hermina Hospital (HEAL) shares from Binsar Parasian
body: On Wednesday, August 21, Yulisar Khiat acquired 38.95 million shares of PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), the company that operates the Hermina Hospital, from Binsar Parasian Simorangkir. Through PT Mandiri Sekuritas, the two individual investors carried out their transactions. While Binsar's shares decreased from 5.89% to 5.64%, Yulisar saw a rise in its share portion from 12% to 12.26%.

title: GEMS’s interim dividend got halved, down 53.84%
body: PT Golden Energy Mines Tbk (GEMS) will distribute interim dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2024 of USD 150 million, down 53.84% from the interim dividend allocation in FY 2023 of USD 325 million.

title: MPXL secures transport contract from Krakatau Semen Indonesia
body: PT MPX Logistics International Tbk (MPXL), a logistics and transportation company, has obtained a new contract from PT Krakatau Semen Indonesia (KSI).

title: ROTI offers the most appetizing dividend yield in processed food industry
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corporindo Tbk (ROTI) recorded the highest dividend yield for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 among its peers in the processed food industry that are listed as constituents of Indeks52.

title: Money in circulation reached IDR 8.97 quadrillion in July 2024
body: Broad money (M2) in circulation was reported reaching IDR 8.97 quadrillion in July 2024, up 7.4% year-on-year (yoy) from July 2023.

title: Govt to hold another state sukuk auction, aiming for IDR 8 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or government sukuk on Tuesday (27/8) next week, with an indicative target of IDR 8 trillion.

title: Morning session saw JCI climbing up
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) climbed up at today’s opening bell (23/8).

title: 2 billion Gojek Tokopedia shares sold, net foreign volume falls to -564.91 million shares
body: On Wednesday, August 21, foreign investors sold the most shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), totaling around 2.04 billion shares with a net volume of -886.48 million shares. This contributed to an increase in the foreign sales volume, which topped 3.71 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was only 3.14 billion shares, bringing net foreign volume down to -564.91 million shares.

title: First half saw ITMG’s profit plummeting 56%
body: The performance of PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG) was being constrained in the first half (H1) of 2024 compared to H1 2023.

title: GEMS saw 5% correction in net profit in H1 2024
body: PT Golden Energy Mines Tbk (GEMS), a trading and mining company under Sinarmas Group, recorded net profit of USD 316.9 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Iforte to set up MTO for IBST’s shares, setting price to IDR 4,067 per share
body: PT Iforte Solusi Infotek, the new controller of PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk (IBST) will conduct a mandatory tender offer for 133.61 million shares or 9.89% of total issued and paid-up capital of IBST.

title: Bank Raya Indonesia secures shareholders’ approval for buyback of IDR 20 billion
body: PT Bank Raya Indonesia Tbk (AGRO), a subsidiary of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), has secured approval from shareholders to conduct a shares buyback.

title: RMKE to distribute loan of IDR 416 billion to affiliates
body: PT RMK Energy Tbk (RMKE), a coal mining logistics company, is offering loan facilities worth a total of IDR 416 billion to several affiliates.

title: Protest at DPR, JCI sluggish throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) reportedly weakens throughout the day (22/8) amidst mass protest outside DPR/MPR Building to rule out Pilkada Bill.

title: Mahaka Radio Integra faced another loss, reaching IDR 9.39 billion this time
body: PT Mahaka Radio Integra Tbk (MARI) once again reported loss of IDR 9.39 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: The Siam Kraft Industry acquires 55% Fajar Surya Wisesa (FASW) shares
body: On Tuesday, August 20, PT Fajar Surya Wisesa Tbk (FASW) appointed foreign investor Siam Kraft Industry Company Limited as its new controller. More than 1.36 billion FASW shares, or 55.24% ownership, were purchased by this Thai investor. In addition to producing packaging paper, FASW is also a part of the Thailand-based SCG Packaging group.

title: Indeks52’s dividend yield face-off: BJBR vs BJTM
body: Two constituents of Indeks52 High Dividend category come from regional bank industry, and competing for the highest dividend yield growth in 2022 and 2023.

title: Pefindo assigns “idA-” rating to Sarana Mitra Luas
body: PT Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo) has assigned an "idA-" rating for PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL), an issuer that operates in the forklift rental sector.

title: Index52 Constituents: AUTO vs SMSM dividend yield
body: Two constituents in the 52 High Dividend Index in the vehicle spare parts industry, PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO) and PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM) pocketed dividend yield growth in 2022 to 2023.

title: BFIN to issue bond of IDR 600 billion
body: PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN) is planning the issuance of Bond VI Phase I Year 2024 with total maximum principal set to IDR 600 billion on September 18-20, 2024.

title: Turning back, MDRN scored IDR 2.84 billion of profit
body: PT Modern Internasional Tbk (MDRN), the sole distributor of Fujifilm products in Indonesia, booked net profit of IDR 2.84 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Foreign investment plummeted 22.41% in Q2 2024
body: Foreign investment in the second quarter (Q2) of 2024 slipped 22.41% compared to the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, and 11.88% lower compared to Q2 2023.

title: Hitting the peak yesterday, JCI saw decline this morning
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was seen declining during the opening of today’s (22/8) morning session, in contrast with JCI’s trend yesterday (21/8) that broke records.

title: PNM to issue sukuk mudharabah of IDR 500 billion
body: PT Permodalan Nasional Madani (Persero) or PNM has issued Medium Term Sukuk Mudharabah VI Year 2024 Phase I with total principal of IDR 500 billion.

title: Private placement I brought IDR 4.09 trillion to PANI’s pocket
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) records extra fund of IDR 4.09 trillion after concluding its first private placement this year yesterday (19/8).

title: Shareholders to hold internal restructure of FASW
body: SCGP Solution, PTE LTD, Singapore, major shareholders of PT Fajar Surya Wisesa Tbk (FASW), transferred 55.24% of the shares to Siam Kraft Industry Company Limited (SKIC) yesterday (20/8).

title: Promoting growth and innovation Bank MNC to work with Venteny for Tabungan Motion
body: PT Bank MNC Internasional Tbk (BABP) is partnering with PT Venteny Fortuna Internasional Tbk (VTNY) to drive growth and innovation through Tabungan Motion and Venteny Employee Super App.

title: Foreign buying volume reaches 3.63 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at 869.49 million shares
body: Foreign investors appeared to expand their share purchases on Tuesday, August 20, with the foreign purchase volume hitting 3.63 billion shares. This increase was due, in part, to foreign investors buying up to 1.51 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 357.11 million shares. The foreign sales volume was 2.76 billion shares, and the net foreign volume was closed at 869.49 million shares.

title: FIF Finance to issue Bond of IDR 2.5 trillion
body: PT Federal International Finance/FIF Finance will issue Shelf-Registration Bond VI Phase IV Year 2024 of IDR 2.5 trillion. The bond will be issued in two series and guaranteed with full commitment.
